tweets.text:
EXCLUSIVE: Yesterday's WORST OF THE WORST arrests of illegals who Democrats are trying to protect including a p*do and human smuggler-- as DHS vows New Year Resolution is to arrest more criminals

- Artemio Gabriel-Perez, a criminal illegal alien from Guatemala, convicted of r*pe in the second degree involving a victim under 12-years-old in Scott County, Kentucky.

- Panfilo Padilla-Garcia, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico, convicted of domestic violence assault in Las Vegas, Nevada.

- Muhammad Baloch, a criminal illegal alien from Pakistan, convicted of manufacturing/delivery of a controlled substance in Collin County, Texas.

- Gabino Huerta-Navarrete, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico, convicted of alien smuggling in Texas.

"“Just yesterday ICE arrested domestic abusers, drug traffickers, and a monster who raped a child under 12-years-old. Our New Year resolution for 2026: more worst of the worst arrests. We are thankful to all our officers who put their lives on the line day-in and day-out to deliver safer neighborhoods for American families.” - @DHSgov
